name: workflow-plugin-namecheap
description: Namecheap DNS provider for workflow IaC (infra.dns) backed by the official go-namecheap-sdk.
author: GoCodeAlone

required_secrets.name: NAMECHEAP_API_USER
required_secrets.description: Namecheap account username (= ApiUser per API)

required_secrets.name: NAMECHEAP_API_KEY
required_secrets.description: Namecheap API key (rotate via Profile → Tools → Namecheap API Access)

required_secrets.name: NAMECHEAP_CLIENT_IP
required_secrets.description: Public IP of the wfctl runner — Namecheap requires single-IP allowlisting (CIDR is unsupported)
